summary: Justin Brennan provides a live walkthrough of a 121-unit multifamily property in Texas, demonstrating operational best practices for larger complexes including on-site management/maintenance structure, unit renovation processes (~$9,000 per unit), and critical water damage prevention protocols during due diligence and cold weather operations.
takeaways: Inspect every building for water shutoffs and angle stops (under sinks) during due diligence tours
Prefer copper pressure lines over galvanized piping to reduce water damage risk; PEX acceptable for new construction
Position water shutoffs as close to individual units/buildings as possible to enable quick emergency response without disrupting multiple tenants
Allocate approximately $14,000 per unit for major renovations to move Class C assets toward B-minus quality
In cold climates during freeze risk, issue tenant notices to drip kitchen sink lines to prevent pipe freezing and explosions
Standard renovation process includes paint, flooring (90% new carpet), countertops, cabinets, appliances, fixtures, and new LVT or similar flooring materials
Model units should be staged like a house flip to showcase potential to prospects; use trifold brochures with floor plans, features, benefits, and pricing as takeaway marketing materials

skill_candidates.change: Add water infrastructure inspection checklist (shutoffs, angle stops, piping type) to property due diligence process
skill_candidates.evidence: Justin emphasizes inspecting every building's water shutoff, angle stops, and piping material (copper vs. galvanized) as critical to avoiding costly water damage; specific instruction to check these during tours and due diligence inspections

skill_candidates.change: Implement cold-weather tenant communication protocol for freeze risk mitigation
skill_candidates.evidence: Justin instructs to 'send out notices to all your tenants to drip the sink lines...to keep the water flowing in the pipes so it never freezes' during freezing temperature periods in cold climates

skill_candidates.change: Establish on-site renovation crew workflow with supply chain management and kits
skill_candidates.evidence: Justin describes two on-site renovation crews, supply room, maintenance room, and process of pre-kitting supplies in units to streamline $9,000 per-unit renovations across 120+ unit properties

title: OAKS APARTMENTS 121 UNITS
